introduction: A multi-role annotation management system covering task creation, annotation delivery, result review, and archive tracking to keep data production reliable.
quickStartDescription: The home page is currently in static welcome mode to avoid relying on unavailable visualization APIs. Dashboard charts and notifications can be re-enabled after backend APIs are ready.

efficiency.title: Efficient Task Flow
efficiency.description: Track assignment and status in one place to reduce repeated communication and improve execution speed.

quality.title: Controllable Quality
quality.description: Review and comparison workflows help catch deviations early and keep annotation standards consistent.

traceability.title: Traceable Process
traceability.description: Key operations and result versions are recorded for easier auditing and issue backtracking.

collaboration.title: Multi-role Collaboration
collaboration.description: Support admin, annotator, and reviewer collaboration in a closed-loop data production workflow.
